title: oldenlandia helferi
intro: Oldenlandia helferi, also known as Helfer's oldenlandia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia helferi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
